summary: Iteration 27 - Invoice Settings and Printer Permissions Testing. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Invoice Settings tab with all fields (phone, address, tax number, custom header/footer, show logo), Printers tab with permission controls (show_prices, print_mode, print_individual_items, auto_print_on_order).
passed_tests: GET /api/tenant/invoice-settings - Returns invoice settings with default fields
POST /api/invoices/print/{order_id} - Basic print returns print_data, print_jobs, printer_settings
POST /api/invoices/print/{order_id}?printer_id={id} - Print with specific printer applies permissions
GET /api/invoices/auto-print/{order_id} - Returns auto print data for all active printers
POST /api/printers - Create printer with show_prices=False works
POST /api/printers - Create printer with print_individual_items=True works

tenant_invoice_settings_api.notes: Settings are saved per tenant and retrieved correctly

invoice_settings_ui.notes: All fields are editable and save correctly

print_invoice_with_permissions.notes: When printer_id is provided, printer permissions are applied to the print output

auto_print_data.notes: Returns print data for all active printers with auto_print_on_order=True, each with their own permissions

printer_permissions_ui.location: Settings > الطابعات tab > Add/Edit Printer Dialog
fields: طباعة جميع الطلبات (Print All Orders) - toggle
طباعة تلقائية عند الطلب (Auto Print on Order) - toggle
printer_permissions_ui.notes: Printers list shows permission status (بدون أسعار = no prices)

login.notes: Beautiful login page with restaurant background slideshow

dashboard.notes: Dashboard shows statistics, quick actions, recent orders

settings_invoice_tab.notes: Invoice Settings tab visible for admin/manager roles, all fields functional

settings_printers_tab.notes: Printers tab shows list with permission indicators, add/edit dialogs have all permission fields

critical_code_review_comments: TenantInvoiceSettings model properly defined with all required fields (server.py lines 6014-6022)
GET/PUT /api/tenant/invoice-settings endpoints properly secured with authentication (lines 6056-6092)
print_invoice endpoint correctly applies printer permissions (show_prices, print_mode, print_individual_items) (lines 10531-10636)
auto_print_data endpoint returns data for all active printers with their individual permissions (lines 10638-10740)
Frontend Invoice Settings tab properly renders all fields with correct state management
Printers UI shows permission status in list view and has all permission controls in add/edit dialogs
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_invoice_settings_iter27.py - Created comprehensive test suite for invoice settings and printer permissions

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load without errors, all features verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test printers with different permission configurations during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 completed successfully. All new features verified: 1) Tenant Invoice Settings API (GET/PUT) working correctly, 2) Invoice Settings UI tab in Settings page with all fields (phone, address, tax, custom texts, show logo), 3) Print Invoice endpoint applies printer permissions (show_prices, print_mode, print_individual_items), 4) Auto Print Data endpoint returns data for all active printers with their permissions, 5) Printers UI shows permission status and has all permission controls. All 12 backend tests passed. No issues found.
